workshoptitle: 26ai Duality Views: Build Updatable JSON Documents

tutorials.title: Get Started
tutorials.description: Log in and get set up for LiveLabs.

tutorials.title: Introduction
tutorials.description: Learn what JSON Relational Duality Views are and what you will build in this lab.

tutorials.title: Lab 1: Create a Tiny Relational Schema
tutorials.description: Create the base tables and seed data for a small conference schema to use with Duality Views.

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Single-Table Duality Views
tutorials.description: Create updatable document views over single tables and apply fine-grained controls such as read-only attributes.

tutorials.title: Lab 3: Multi-Table Duality View
tutorials.description: Create a multi-table duality view that produces one nested document per attendee, including sessions and speakers.

tutorials.title: Lab 4: CRUD Through Documents
tutorials.description: Insert, update, and delete data using the JSON document interface backed by relational tables.

tutorials.title: Lab 5: Query Documents with SQL
tutorials.description: Query nested JSON documents using SQL and JSON_TABLE to flatten arrays into rows.

tutorials.title: Lab 6: Clean Up (Optional)
tutorials.description: Drop the duality views and tables to return the workspace to a clean state.

tutorials.title: Need Help?
tutorials.description: Solutions to common problems and directions for receiving live help.
